findings.problem: The schoolhouse dust-memory arrives with strong sensory setup, but the passage quickly resolves into a nearly complete moral lesson for Thea. Because the world's memory rule is supposed to stay fragmentary and sensory rather than fully explanatory, the sequence starts reading like a neatly themed proof point instead of an uncanny fragment that destabilizes her.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the memory passage around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:141 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:165 so it stays partial. Keep the cold room, the roster call, Ruthie's line, and Thea's present-time recoil, but replace the direct interpretive summary around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:161 with a concrete bodily or environmental consequence that lets the reader infer the shame without the narration fully closing the meaning.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised memory sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:141 still shows specific sensory fragments and Thea's reaction, but no sentence in that span fully paraphrases the passage's moral meaning for the reader; Thea's shame must be legible through an observable action, sensation, or object interaction in the present-time room.

findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly lands on the same aphoristic negation-and-correction construction: a scene is first denied or minimized, then restated as a wiser abstract verdict. Used this many times, the move stops feeling sharp and starts reading like a house style tic, flattening the close-third texture into authored pronouncement rather than Thea's immediate, embodied perception.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the capstone lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:51, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:165, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:287, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:433 so only the single strongest turn keeps this rhetorical shape. In the other targeted spots, end on concrete body, object, or social-detail consequences instead of an abstract 'That was/It was/not X but Y' summation.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after revision, no more than one of the targeted passages still resolves through a negation-then-redefinition formula and at least three of those same beats now end on a concrete physical or social detail that a reader can point to on the page.

summary: Booker and dialogue pass: the chapter cleanly lands the aftermath-to-exit spine, keeps canonical past tense, introduces the Lincoln letter as a real engine, and maintains distinct, period-credible speech with healthy contraction use. Craft and prose fail because the schoolhouse memory over-explains what should remain more fragmentary, and the narration overuses aphoristic negation/correction capstones that flatten the close-third voice. No continuity contradictions were found against the provided continuity sheet.
